purpose: Convert Batch114 dependency evidence into a safer, lower-concurrency build attempt path and record build-timeout blockers honestly.

observedBlocker.impact: A compiled app still cannot be called build-ready if the build command does not exit 0 inside the verification window.

stabilityGuardrails: Limit Next build worker pressure in constrained CI/ChatGPT/Termux/Vercel-like environments.
Avoid static prerender claims for the demo shell until build and live smoke pass.
Run npm run typecheck separately before build:clean, then let Next build focus on production compilation/static generation instead of duplicating type validation in constrained environments.
Keep source-level validators separate from build/runtime proof.
Do not add product features while build/runtime closure is the blocker.

artifactHygiene: node_modules/ must not enter final ZIP

allowedClaimsWhenOnlySourcePasses: The repo has a lower-concurrency build configuration and a report for build-timeout blockers.
Build/runtime/hosted remain unclaimed unless the commands exit 0.
forbiddenClaimsWhenCommandsFailOrTimeout: Do not say build-ready if npm run build or npm run build:clean times out.
Do not say runtime-ready if live smoke is not run or fails.
Do not say hosted-ready without GIAOAN_DEMO_URL smoke pass.
Do not say production-ready while auth/session/CSRF runtime smoke is missing or failed.
